creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
On Sun, Feb 25, 2007 at 12:36:53AM +0100, Ralf van der Enden wrote:
> I've noticed this has been released back into the pool. I've received a 
> pointyhat(ports-amd64 AT pointyhat DOT freebsd DOT org) report (mail 
> from Kris Kennaway (kris AT obscurity DOT org). Shouldn't he be made 
> responsible for this update (or at least the gcc 4.x part of it) ?

If that were the case, then kris would be responsible for fixing the
entire Ports Collection.  Although he sometimes make it seem as though
he is trying to do that, neither he nor any one person can do so.

He merely notifies people of breakage in these cases.  (I will skip all
the work he does on the ports infrastructure and base system performance,
for which, see other threads).

He has sent literally thousands of these emails; someone else will need
to pick up this particular problem and work on it.

mcl
